Generated: 2026-07-12

## Modified Files

None - Original CAROTS code preserved

## Files Status Summary

Total new files: 48
- Python code: 19 files (~3,400 lines)
- Tests: 11 files (~800 lines)
- Bash scripts: 8 files (~400 lines)
- Configuration: 5 files
- Documentation: 7 files (~3,000 lines)

## Not Created (Intentional)

The following files were intentionally NOT created because they require:
1. Server execution
2. Real data access
3. GPU availability
4. Full training completion

Not created:
- configs/rd_carots/*.yaml (model configs - need RDCAROTS integration in config.py)
- scripts/server/06-13 (experiment runners - need full training integration)
- Integration hooks in original CAROTS (models/build.py, trainer.py, etc.)
- run_rd_carots.py (main entry point - needs config integration)

These will be needed for actual server experiments but were beyond the scope of core algorithm implementation.
